svg.title: Music recommender system diagram with expanded scenarios
svg.desc: Flowchart showing all components including three expanded input scenarios that converge into profile building, matching, explanation, and output

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the user input look like?')
sendPrompt('How does the dataset layer work?')
sendPrompt('How are the three input scenarios detected?')
sendPrompt('How does the description-only scenario work?')
sendPrompt('How does the blended scenario work?')
sendPrompt('How does the songs-only scenario work?')
sendPrompt('How does the profile builder work?')

g.text: Clamp all values to valid ranges

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the matching engine score songs?')
g.text: Binary genre match + artist diversity filter

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the explainer generate explanations?')
sendPrompt('What does the Streamlit output look like?')
sendPrompt('What gets saved to the session log?')
sendPrompt('How does human evaluation work in this project?')
